flows.name: View Portfolio About Section
flows.description: Access the portfolio owner's biographical information and professional introduction

steps.action: View About Me content displayed after automatic redirect

flows.name: Browse Talks and Presentations
flows.description: View a collection of talks and presentations delivered by the portfolio owner

steps.action: Click Talks tab in header navigation
View talks list with details and event information
steps.userIntent: Browse available talks and speaking engagements

flows.name: Browse Podcasts
flows.description: View a collection of podcasts created by or featuring the portfolio owner

steps.action: Click Podcasts tab in header navigation
View podcasts list with episode details and metadata

flows.name: Browse Blog Articles
flows.description: View and read blog posts or articles published by the portfolio owner

steps.action: Click Blog tab in header navigation
View blog posts list with article metadata and summaries

flows.name: Access Contact Information
flows.description: View contact information and communication options to reach the portfolio owner

steps.action: Click Contact tab in header navigation
steps.userIntent: Find ways to contact the portfolio owner

steps.action: View contact form, direct contact information, and social links

flows.name: Toggle Dark Mode Theme
flows.description: Switch between light and dark theme across the portfolio application

steps.action: Locate and interact with theme toggle in application header
Application transitions to dark theme via ThemeProvider context
steps.userIntent: Apply dark mode preference across all portfolio sections

flows.name: Navigate Between Portfolio Sections
flows.description: Switch between different content sections (About, Talks, Podcasts, Blog, Contact) using header navigation

steps.action: View content in current portfolio section with active tab highlighted
Click a different tab in header navigation to switch sections
Navigate to selected section and view its content with updated active tab state
